title: senecio thorbeckei
intro: Senecio thorbeckei, also known as the Thorbecke's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of alkaloids such as senecin. The plant has been valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio thorbeckei can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it's essential to exercise caution and consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
